message:
fix: address round 4 review issues across 12 areas

- session_end preserves token counts and turn; session_start resets them
- buildAgentTree checks success field on session_end (failed vs completed)
- AgentTree useEffect uses stable hasRunningChild dependency
- continue() emits session_start before runLoop for proper stats tracking
- groupEvents clears pendingActStarts on session_end to prevent stale cards
- groupEvents reads primitive args from primitive_start, not primitive_end
- render-event.ts adds explicit llm_start/llm_chunk/llm_end cases
- ConversationView adds TODO about fragile streaming detection
- buildAgentTree adds TODO for root agentName from event data
- Multi-session lifecycle test verifies token reset across sessions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
